data.body:
=== HANDOFF (fresh-context) 2026-07-07 ===
EPIC effete-sanctified-sambar (1d96-6bc8-9749-45b8) = Janitor Cleanup 2026-07-07, in_progress. Goal: complete all children as a stacked Gerrit change, close each via completion verifier, land the stack on main.
WORKTREE: .claude/worktrees/janitor-cleanup-0707, branch worktree-janitor-cleanup-0707, off origin/main. ALWAYS 'source .venv/bin/activate' each command (local build). Commit author MUST be joeoakhart+bot@navapbc.com / RebarBotNava (git -c user.email=joeoakhart+bot@navapbc.com -c user.name=RebarBotNava commit).
STACK: 15 commits, tip 2c47c7c06, rebased onto origin/main c005f242b, PUSHED to Gerrit refs/for/main = changes 374-388 (relation chain). CI(Verified)+review-bot(LLM-Review) running.
CHANGE MAP: 374 fa98(editor XSS) 375 cf1b(detector_matches) 376 0712(context builder) 377 183e(call_with_backoff) 378 ecb9(dispatch_mutation) 379 c9a5(F14 repo_root) 380 9858(replay flatten) 381 e061(verdict request obj) 382 25bf(engine_b/_llm_commands split) 383 4428(TicketQuery) 384 4532(thin __init__) 385 9cf3(allowlist ratchet) 386 090a(reconciler fn extraction) 387 6619(invariant split) 388 6c4b(git adapter).
TICKET STATES: CLOSED+certified(10): fa98 cf1b 0712 183e ecb9 c9a5 9858 e061 25bf 4428. IN_PROGRESS (implemented+pushed, close DEFERRED per CI rule): 4532 9cf3 090a 6619 6c4b. OPEN (remaining to implement): 5274 7c92 9f40 44be. c244(lowerclass-creased-fruitbat) REMOVED from scope (user: moving to another epic; must NOT be a child of this epic at epic-close time or open-children guard blocks close).
CI RULE (CLAUDE.local.md, added mid-run): a child must be CI-green (Gerrit Verified +1, OR pre-flight 'make lint && make typecheck && make test' all green) BEFORE 'transition <child> closed'. So: close the 5 in_progress + the 4 remaining ONLY after their Gerrit Verified +1, bottom-first. The 10 already-closed were closed BEFORE this rule (on green targeted tests + a full make test at 4532 that passed after fixing 9858); they will be re-validated by CI on push.
NEXT-CHILD FLOW: review-plan <alias> --ref HEAD (must PASS, no BLOCK; attestations are HEAD-pinned since file_impact empty, so ALWAYS --ref HEAD right before claim) -> claim <alias> --assignee RebarBotNava -> implement (delegate large refactors to general-purpose subagents with precise briefs; review their diff) -> ruff/tests green -> commit (rebar-ticket: <id> trailer) -> push updated stack. Bugs(none left) need --reason 'Fixed:'.
